body:
**Uberon term**
conus arteriosus UBERON:0003983 has_part UBERON:0007181 serosa of infundibulum of uterine tube
conus arteriosus UBERON:0003983 has_part UBERON:0007182 muscle layer of infundibulum of uterine tube

**Bug description**
conus arteriosus UBERON:0003983 is part of right ventricle of heart, not uterus. Error may be due to infundibulum being synonym of "outflow part of right ventricle" UBERON:0005953

comments.body: This issue has not seen any activity in the past 6 months; it will be closed automatically one year from now if no action is taken.
@dragon-ai-agent, remove the incorrect part-ofs on UBERON:0007181 and UBERON:0007182

title: relation error: conus arteriosus has_part *uterine tube
